name: hobo-berlin
description: An in-browser game for hobos moving around Berlin, collecting bottles in exchange for money to buy food and weed.

scripts.audio:generate: node scripts/generate-sfx.mjs && node scripts/generate-modern-sfx.mjs && node scripts/generate-theme-music.mjs
scripts.test:audio: node --test tests/audio-assets.test.js tests/audio-runtime.test.js && vitest run tests/unit/phaser-audio.test.ts
